creator: statue@softwareliberty.org
text:
update ac13.tar.Z to ac14.tar.Z
	add support for Adobe Systems Tech Note #5080 "Adobe-CNS1-4 Character Collection for CID-Keyed Fonts"
update ag13.tar.Z to ac14.tar.Z
	add support for Adobe Systems Tech Note #5079 "Adobe-GB1-4 Character Collection for CID-Keyed Fonts"
